📥 Import Students
Bulk import from Excel / CSV file
📥 Bulk Import Students
Upload an Excel (.xlsx) or CSV file to import multiple students at once into a specific class & section.
📁
Click to select file or drag & drop
Supports .xlsx, .xls, .csv files
📋 Required Columns
• name — Full Name (required)
• roll_no — Roll Number (required)
• email — Email (optional)
• mobile — Phone (optional)
• gender — M/F/Other (optional)
• dob — Date of Birth (optional)
• father_name — Father (optional)
